name: Create Rhythm Notation Lesson Flipchart
description: A 3rd grade music teacher needs a lesson flipchart on rhythm basics. Create a 4-page ActivInspire flipchart saved as /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/rhythm_basics.flipchart. The flipchart must include: a title page with the title 'Rhythm Basics' and a subtitle about note values; a note value chart for Whole (4 beats), Half (2 beats), Quarter (1 beat), and Eighth (1/2 beat) notes featuring note head shapes and labels; a counting exercise titled 'Count the Beats' with numbers 1, 2, 3, 4; and an activity page titled 'Clap the Rhythm' with a simple clapping pattern or instruction.
